form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of nine weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Newcastle All Weather February 6 over 1400m, 7 len behind Benacre with 59.5kg at $9.50. When resuming last campaign second last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather October 27 over 1600m, 6 len behind Oursin with 59kg at $10. Has a fine first-up record and is worth including.
